testcase.name: test_get_services_for_order

failure.message: AssertionError: assert 'services' in [{'avg_time': '1-24 hours', 'category_id': 'cat_facebook', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.107097+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'avg_time': '1-48 hours', 'category_id': 'cat_facebook', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.106928+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'avg_time': '1-12 hours', 'category_id': 'cat_instagram', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.105382+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'avg_time': '0-24 hours', 'category_id': 'cat_instagram', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.084651+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'avg_time': '0-6 hours', 'category_id': 'cat_instagram', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.104892+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'avg_time': '0-1 hour', 'category_id': 'cat_instagram', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.105175+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, ...]

testcase.failure: tests/test_admin_apis.py:466: in test_get_services_for_order assert "services" in data E AssertionError: assert 'services' in [{'avg_time': '1-24 hours', 'category_id': 'cat_facebook', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.107097+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'avg_time': '1-48 hours', 'category_id': 'cat_facebook', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.106928+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'avg_time': '1-12 hours', 'category_id': 'cat_instagram', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.105382+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'avg_time': '0-24 hours', 'category_id': 'cat_instagram', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.084651+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'avg_time': '0-6 hours', 'category_id': 'cat_instagram', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.104892+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, {'avg_time': '0-1 hour', 'category_id': 'cat_instagram', 'created_at': '2026-03-01T16:53:03.105175+00:00', 'is_active': True, ...}, ...]
